situational_context: Early structured rebuild with return-to-running protocol initiated (Week 1 since May 3, first run in 182 days: 2.47 km, load 7). Chronic load rising from ultra-low base (23.7, 1.5% of historical peak 1608). Training pattern: gravel commute spikes (suffer 55-57) + e-bike commutes (suffer 6-14) + first tentative run. Weight trending down (-2.1 kg in 18d to 104.78 kg). HRV stable (38 avg), RHR improved (53->49). Readiness high today (82, BB 65). VO2max running recalibrated 40.9->38.6 post-first-run (expected). Primary constraint: tissue tolerance at 105 kg after 182-day running gap. Vitamin D insufficient (27 ng/mL, Dec 2025) — supplementation started. Young baby (Leonie, ~4 months) — expect occasional sleep fragmentation.

plan_7d_ahead.type: Endurance Z2 velo ou run court (2e run semaine 1)

recommendations.text: Continue return-to-running protocol Week 1: attempt second short run on Saturday May 9 (2.5-3 km, 20-25 min, Z1-Z2, soft surface Bois de Vincennes) ONLY if no localized pain persists from the May 3 run. If any Achilles/patellar/tibial discomfort, default to cycling.
recommendations.measurable: Complete second run <=3 km without tissue complaint, or consciously default to cycling if symptomatic

recommendations.text: Moderate gravel commute intensity on May 6-7. The May 1 gravel (suffer 55) crashed readiness to 25 for 2 days. Two consecutive high-intensity gravel commutes would compromise the weekend sessions. Aim for at least one ebike day, or keep gravel in Z2 (no sprints) to cap suffer below 30.
recommendations.measurable: Training readiness >=50 on Friday May 8, enabling the weekend sessions

recommendations.text: Increase daily protein to 150g+ (currently averaging 126g, 16% below target). At 105 kg during return-to-running, 1.4-1.6 g/kg/day optimizes tendon and muscle tissue remodeling. Prioritize protein at breakfast and post-session.
recommendations.measurable: >=5 of next 7 days with protein >=140g logged

markers_to_watch.threshold: Any localized pain (Achilles, patellar, tibial, plantar) lasting >24h after the May 3 run
markers_to_watch.reason: At 105 kg after 182-day gap, tissue tolerance is the rate-limiter. Pain >24h = skip Saturday run.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Currently 38.6, dropped from 40.9. Watch for stabilization or further decline over next 2-3 runs.
markers_to_watch.reason: Garmin recalibrated after seeing running performance post-layoff. Should stabilize as run consistency builds.

markers_to_watch.threshold: ACWR should stay <=1.30 after commute days are factored in
markers_to_watch.reason: Two gravel commutes (suffer 55 each) would add ~110 load. If ACWR >1.30, cancel Friday session and reduce weekend.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Target gradual increase toward 35-40 over next 2 weeks
markers_to_watch.reason: Currently at 23.7 (1.5% of historical peak). Any structured consistency will drive this up.
